name: EduLab, Inc.
summary: EduLab, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, researches and develops academic ability measurement technologies and educational tools in Japan and internationally. The company provides test and study services primarily for language learning educational institutions, including universities, private companies, and individuals. It also offers Einavi! and StudyGear, an online service that supports learners preparing for the test in practical English proficiency; Eiken Jr., an English-language education and testing program for preschool and elementary school children; TEAP CBT; an English proficiency test for reading, writing, listening, and speaking; computerized assessment system for English communication (CASEC), an English proficiency test that utilizes item response theory and computer-adaptive testing technologies; and speaking test systems for Eiken grade 4 and 5, online Eiken enrollment and various fee payment solution, as well as support systems for Eiken group enrollment. The company was founded in 2015 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
